# training outbreak modelling

### Plug-n-play

epirecipes http://epirecip.es/epicookbook/
epiverse
recon/outbreak
ggoutbreak https://ai4ci.github.io/ggoutbreak/articles/ggoutbreak.html

### modelling

compartmental modelling in stan https://github.com/MLGlobalHealth/stancon2024_infectious_diseases
